name: airwallex-agentos
description: Bring Airwallex's global financial infrastructure to Codex. Orchestrate actions across your account in plain language, e.g., set up invoices from a PO, onboard suppliers from invoices, and check current cash position across currencies. AgentOS bundles pre-built finance Skills with MCP servers. A public CLI connects your agent to Airwallex's capabilities.

interface.shortDescription: Bring Airwallex's global financial infrastructure to Codex.
interface.longDescription: Bring Airwallex's global financial infrastructure to Codex. Orchestrate actions across your account in plain language, e.g., set up invoices from a PO, onboard suppliers from invoices, and check current cash position across currencies. AgentOS bundles pre-built finance Skills with MCP servers. A public CLI connects your agent to Airwallex's capabilities.
defaultPrompt: Extract billing details from this contract and create an invoice
Create a beneficiary from this supplier document
Provision a virtual card with a $5,000 monthly limit
Show me a cashflow summary across all currencies
